_publications._publicationTitle: Centralizing neurofibromatosis experimental tool knowledge with the NF Research Tools Database.

_contextSnippet: From the home page, users can type in a search term of interest (e.g. 'plexiform neurofibroma'; Figure 2A) to identify NF1-relevant animal models and cell lines. From there, users can use interactive, clickable charts to further filter and refine their results
details: Provides two avenues for exploring tools: search functionality with free-text terms and interactive, clickable charts for filtering and refining results
